rows.label: qev042204_MSG0002
rows.name:
Nipopon thought he was quite strong,
but well, it cannot be helped, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042204_MSG0003
rows.name:
Now then, I will get the
blessing over with quickly, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042204_MSG0005
rows.name:
I have infused Nipopon's blessing
into the Nopon gemstone, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042204_MSG0006
rows.name:
It seems you are one step closer
to the origin of the Nopon, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042204_MSG0007
rows.name: Do your best, I suppose, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042204_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ah, please tell the Divine Nopopon that
"his archaic tone is a bit weird, mo."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042204_MSG0009
rows.name:
He tries too hard, saying he needs
to establish his character, mo.[ST:wait ]
